reason: A blood-soaked odyssey into love, media frenzy, and manic devotion.
Flawed lovers on the run, rewriting romance in a blaze of infamy.
A violent romance that combusts into tragedy and cathartic release.
High-voltage passion and icy detective games ignite dangerous desire.
An unexpected crash of souls spirals into raw, chaotic intimacy.
Star-crossed teens collide in classic passion, ruin, and redemption.
Obsessive love blurs sanity in a dark, combustible relationship.
A wife explores her sexuality, shattering norms and hearts.
Two lost souls find love on a road trip that shines bright and messy.
A secret service agent learns love can be as lethal as his weapons.
